name: Topical Anesthetic Cream
about: Topical Anesthetic Cream is a highly effective solution for numbing the skin before any procedure. The cream is easy to use and suitable for all skin types. Its unique formula makes it perfect for those who want to avoid discomfort during cosmetic procedures, tattooing, or any other skin-related procedure. The cream is white in color and has a creamy texture. It is recommended to store in a dry place. The cream is not disposable, so it can be used multiple times.

faq.q: Is it safe to use on sensitive skin?
faq.a: Yes, Topical Anesthetic Cream is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

faq.q: How long does it take to work?
faq.a: The cream takes approximately 20-30 minutes to take effect.

faq.q: Can it be used for tattooing?
faq.a: Yes, Topical Anesthetic Cream is perfect for numbing the skin before tattooing or any other cosmetic procedure.
No, the cream is not waterproof. It is recommended to avoid contact with water after application.

faq.q: How long does the effect last?
faq.a: The duration of the effect depends on the amount of cream applied and the area of the skin. However, the effect can last up to 2 hours.
